revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月十三]][[zh:十二月十三]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 13|qq=December 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}} the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} . == Events == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 12 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1842|en|1842|qid=Q7625|lt=1842|1=1842}}th year {{ill|January 24|en|January 24|qid=Q2278|lt=January 24|1=January 24}} ) - The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} issues the {{ill|Dissolution Order of Guilds|ja|株仲間解散令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dissolution Order of Guilds|1=Dissolution Order of Guilds|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q60988268}} , ordering the dissolution of {{ill|Kabunakama|en|Kabunakama|qid=Q2090593|lt=kabunakama|1=Kabunakama}} (merchant guilds). == Births == * {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|qid=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1835|en|1835|qid=Q7597|lt=1835|1=1835}}th year {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}} ) - {{ill|Empress Dowager Eishō|en|Empress Dowager Eishō|qid=Q862582|lt=Empress Eishō|1=Empress Dowager Eishō}} , consort of {{ill|Emperor Kōmei|en|Emperor Kōmei|qid=Q299179|lt=Emperor Kōmei|1=Emperor Kōmei}} and adoptive mother of {{ill|Emperor Meiji|en|Emperor Meiji|qid=Q174231|lt=Emperor Meiji|1=Emperor Meiji}} (* {{ill|1897|en|1897|qid=Q7847|lt=1897|1=1897}} ). * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}}th year {{ill|January 22|en|January 22|qid=Q2275|lt=January 22|1=January 22}} ) - {{ill|Katai Tayama|en|Katai Tayama|qid=Q332975|lt=Tayama Katai|1=Katai Tayama}} , novelist (* {{ill|1930|en|1930|qid=Q18787|lt=1930|1=1930}} ). == Deaths == * {{ill|Kempo (era)|en|Kempo (era)|qid=Q1194251|lt=Kenpō (era)|1=Kempo (era)}} 1 ( {{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1214|en|1214|qid=Q5358|lt=1214|1=1214}}th year {{ill|January 25|en|January 25|qid=Q2279|lt=January 25|1=January 25}} ) - {{ill|Kenreimon-in|ja|建礼門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kenreimon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 平徳子|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 平徳子|1=Taira no Tokuko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3315855}} ({{ill|Taira no Tokuko|ja|Heitokuko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Tokuko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ), {{ill|Empress consort of Japan|ja|中宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress consort of Japan|1=Chūgū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10875159}} to {{ill|Emperor Takakura|ja|Emperor Takakura|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emperor Takakura|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , mother of {{ill|Emperor Antoku|en|Emperor Antoku|qid=Q316651|lt=Emperor Antoku|1=Emperor Antoku}} , and second daughter of [[Taira no Kiyomori]]{{citation needed |Taira no Kiyomori|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taira no Kiyomori|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (* {{ill|1155|en|1155|qid=Q19650|lt=1155|1=1155}} ). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Shōgatsu Kotohajime|ja|正月事始め|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shōgatsu Kotohajime|1=Shogatsu Jishime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545487}} * {{ill|Susuharai|ja|煤払い|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Susuharai|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 掃除|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 掃除|1=Cleaning|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q12773274}} * {{ill|Matsumukae|ja|松迎え|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsumukae|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|12|12|14|11|13|1|12|1213|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
